TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Kamamang katta mi-pa-sousou-en-nau ymoumi-æn, alei ka assi-ah-kamou pa-sai saiila kouap-pin.
Kamamang katta mi-pa-sousou-en-nau ymoumi-æn, alei ka assi-ah-kamou pa-sai saiila kouap-pin.
S.TRANSL: Dese dingen hebbe ick tot u gesproken op Dat ghy niet ge-ergert en wordt.
These things have I spoken unto you, that ye should not be offended.
「我已將這些事告訴你們，使你們不至於跌倒。

S.FORM: Pou-tauwag-ah-ta neni ymoumi-n ki Pæu'i-a saal-lan: ra ierroua ta kidi ki tæ'lei, ka veiagh ka pakapatei-ah ymou-mi-æn, pæh-dimdim-eih tyn ka 'illig-auh [ki anna] tmamud ki Alid.
Pou-tauwag-ah-ta neni ymoumi-n ki Pæu'i-a saal-lan: ra ierroua ta kidi ki tæ'lei, ka veiagh ka pakapatei-ah ymou-mi-æn, pæh-dimdim-eih tyn ka 'illig-auh [ki anna] tmamud ki Alid.
S.TRANSL: Sy sullen u uyt de Synagogen werpen : jae de uyre komt Dat een yegelick die u sal dooden sal meynen Go-Gode eenen Dienst te doen.
They shall put you out of the synagogues: yea, the time cometh, that whosoever killeth you will think that he doeth God service.
人要把你們趕出會堂，並且時候將到，凡殺你們的就以為是事奉上帝。

S.FORM: Kapa-am't-eih nein ta ka-mamang katta ymoumi-æn, alei ka assi-nein ni-k'alang-un ta Rama ti jau-appa ki rouma.
Kapa-am't-eih nein ta kamamang katta ymoumi-æn, alei ka assi-nein ni-k'alang-un ta Rama ti jau-appa ki rouma.
S.TRANSL: Ende dese dinghen sullen sy u doen Om Dat sy Den Dader niet gekent en hebben nochte my.
And these things will they do unto you, because they have not known the Father, nor me.
他們這樣行，是因未曾認識父，也未曾認識我。

S.FORM: Râ ni-pa-sousou-en-nau-kamou ki mamang katta, alei ka rou ierrou'-âl-ato ta kidi ki tæ'-lei, ka mi-balei-ah-kamou ki ni-vanna vanna-en-nau ymoumi-æn: râ assi-mau ni-pa-sousou-en ymoumi-æn ta mamang k'atta tou naunamou kalahei, alei ka i-tou-lam-app'-oh ymoumi-æn.

Râ ni-pa-sousou-en-nau-kamou ki mamang katta, alei ka rou ierrou'-âl-ato ta kidi ki tæ'lei, ka mi-balei-ah-kamou ki ni-vanna vanna-en-nau ymoumi-æn: râ assi-mau ni-pa-sousou-en ymoumi-æn ta mamang k'atta tou naunamou kalahei, alei ka i-tou-lam-app'-oh ymoumi-æn.
S.TRANSL: Maer Dese Dinghen hebbe ick tot u gesproken op dat Wanneer de uyre sal gekomen zijn ghy derselber meught gedencken Dat ickse u geseght hebbe : Noch Dese dinghen en hebbe ick u ban het begin niet geseght om Dat ick by u-lieden was.
But these things have I told you, that when the time shall come, ye may remember that I told you of them. And these things I said not unto you at the beginning, because I was with you.
我將這事告訴你們，是叫你們到了時候可以想起我對你們說過了。」

S.FORM: Ka hnyn d'marang-koh mou-koua tyni-æn ka ni-madin-gi-jau-an, ka assi tmaligh jau-an ta ti mamang ymoumi-æn, Dmarang kow mou-koua tou mang?
Ka hnyn d'marang-koh mou-koua tyni-æn ka ni-madin-gi-jau-an, ka assi tmaligh jau-an ta ti mamang ymoumi-æn, Dmarang kow mou-koua tou mang?
S.TRANSL: Ende nu gae ick henen tot den genen Die my gesonden heeft ende niemandt ban u en braeght my Waer gaet ghy henen :
But now I go my way to him that sent me; and none of you asketh me, Whither goest thou?
現今我往差我來的父那裏去，你們中間並沒有人問我：『你往哪裏去？』

S.FORM: Râ alei ka ni-pasousou-en-nau ta mamang katta ymou-mi-æn, patta-haboun-nen-ato ki voulas ta tintin-oumi.
Râ alei ka ni-pasousou-en-nau ta mamang katta ymou-mi-æn, patta-haboun-nen-ato ki voulas ta tintin-oumi.
S.TRANSL: Maer om Dat ick Dese dingen tot u gesproken hebbe soo heeft De droesheyt uwâ€™ herte berbult.
But because I have said these things unto you, sorrow hath filled your heart.
只因我將這事告訴你們，你們就滿心憂愁。

S.FORM: Ra mattæ'i-tiktik-koh ymou-mi-æn, mariang ymoumi-æn ka d'marang-koh: ndarou assi-koh d'marang, assi ierrou'-ah ymou-mi-æn ta Tama-Paka-haniap: heirou-ra d'marang-koh, padingi-ei-mau ta teni pa-'oukoua ymou-mi-æn.

Ra mattæ'i-tiktik-koh ymou-mi-æn, mariang ymoumi-æn ka d'marang-koh: ndarou assi-koh d'marang, assi ierrou'-ah ymou-mi-æn ta Tama-Paka-haniap: heirou-ra d'marang-koh, padingi-ei-mau ta teni pa-'oukoua ymou-mi-æn.
S.TRANSL: Doch ick segghe u De waerheyt het is u nut dat ick wegh gae : want indien ick niet wegh en gae soo en sal De Trooster tot u niet komen: maer indien ick henen gae so sal ick hem tot u senden.
Nevertheless I tell you the truth; It is expedient for you that I go away: for if I go not away, the Comforter will not come unto you; but if I depart, I will send him unto you.
然而，我將真情告訴你們，我去是與你們有益的；我若不去，保惠師就不到你們這裏來；我若去，就差他來。

S.FORM: Irou ka ierrou'-âto ta te-ni, pak'is-auh tyn ta næi ki varau, ki katiktik-kan, ki dungdung-en.
Irou ka ierrou'-âto ta te-ni, pak'is-auh tyn ta næi ki varau, ki katiktik-kan, ki dungdung-en.
S.TRANSL: Ende die gekomen zijnde salde Werelt obertuygen ban ban Ende en ban gerechtigheyt ende ban oordel.
And when he is come, he will reprove the world of sin, and of righteousness, and of judgment:
他既來了，就要叫世人為罪、為義、為審判，自己責備自己。

S.FORM: Ki varau, aleik a assi nein tna-msing-en jau-an:
Ki varau, aleik a assi nein tna-msing-en jau-an:
S.TRANSL: Dan sonde om Dat sy in my niet en gelooben :
Of sin, because they believe not on me;
為罪，是因他們不信我；

S.FORM: Ki katiktik-kan, alei ka d'marang-koh mou-koua ti Rama-an, ka assi-kamou kmytta-al-ato jau-an:
Ki katiktik-kan, alei ka d'marang-koh mou-koua ti Rama-an, ka assi-kamou kmytta-al-ato jau-an:
S.TRANSL: Ende ban gerechtigheyt om Dat ick tot mijnen Dader Henen gae ende ghy en sult my niet meer sien :
Of righteousness, because I go to my Father, and ye see me no more;
為義，是因我往父那裏去，你們就不再見我；

S.FORM: Ki dungdung-en, alei ka kaha'-n-nato dmundung ta Mei-sasou ki ni katta.
Ki dungdung-en, alei ka kaha'-n-nato dmundung ta Mei-sasou ki ni katta.
S.TRANSL: Ende ban oordeel om dat de Oberste deser werelt geoordeelt is.
Of judgment, because the prince of this world is judged.
為審判，是因這世界的王受了審判。

S.FORM: Madag'-app'-ohki ynna-mau ka sou ymoumi-æn, ra assi-kamou i-lpough tubbugh hnyn.
Madag'-app'-ohki ynna-mau ka sou ymoumi-æn, ra assi-kamou i-lpough tubbugh hnyn.
S.TRANSL: Noch bele dingen hebbe ick u te seggen doch ghy En kondt die nu niet dragen.
I have yet many things to say unto you, but ye cannot bear them now.
「我還有好些事要告訴你們，但你們現在擔當不了。

S.FORM: Irou, kaierrou'-il-ato ta teni ka Joep-pan ki katiktik-kan ki sou, teni ta dmylloug-ah ymoumi-æn tou ymmid ki katik-tik-kan kisou. Ka assi sykkoun-noung-ah masousou, ra kama-mang ka ni-illing-hen tyn, pa-sousou-eih tyn, kamamang-ap-pa ka ietrou-ahdou roumang pa-'ou-mhg-eih tyn ymoumi-n.

Irou, kaierrou'-il-ato ta teni ka Joep-pan ki katiktik-kan ki sou, teni ta dmylloug-ah ymoumi-æn tou ymmid ki katik-tik-kan kisou. Ka assi sykkoun-noung-ah masousou, ra kama-mang ka ni-illing-hen tyn, pa-sousou-eih tyn, kamamang-ap-pa ka ietrou-ahdou roumang pa-'ou-mhg-eih tyn ymoumi-n.
S.TRANSL: Maer wanneer die sal gekomen zijn [namelick] de Geest der waechheyt hy sal u in alle de waerheyt leyden. Want hy sal ban hem-selben: niet spreken maer soo wat hy sal gehoort hebben sal hy spreken ende toekomende Dingen sal hy u verkondigen.

Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come.
只等真理的聖靈來了，他要引導你們明白一切的真理；因為他不是憑自己說的，乃是把他所聽見的都說出來，並要把將來的事告訴你們。

S.FORM: Teni ta pou-vavau-ah ki kidi jau-an': ka ar-'auh tyn ki na a-jau,pa-'ou-mhga[kiatta]ymou-mi-æn.
Teni ta pou-vavau-ah ki kidi jau-an': ka ar-'auh tyn ki na a-jau,pa-'ou-mhga[kiatta]ymou-mi-æn.
S.TRANSL: Die sal my berheerlicken: want hy sal't unt het mijne nemen ende sal het u verkondigen.
He shall glorify me: for he shall receive of mine, and shall shew it unto you.
他要榮耀我，因為他要將受於我的告訴你們。

S.FORM: Ka mamang ka â-tou Rama, a-jau taanna : alei ki atta ni-pa-fousou-en-nau, ka a'-auh tyn ki na a-jau, pa-'ou-mhga ymou-mi-æn.
Ka mamang ka â-tou Rama, a-jau taanna : alei ki atta ni-pa-fousou-en-nau, ka a'-auh tyn ki na a-jau, pa-'ou-mhga ymou-mi-æn.
S.TRANSL: Al wat de Dader heeft is mijne : daerom hebbe ick geseght Dat hy't uyt het mijne sal nemen ende u berkondighen.
All things that the Father hath are mine: therefore said I, that he shall take of mine, and shall shew it unto you.
凡父所有的，都是我的；所以我說，他要將受於我的告訴你們。」

S.FORM: Assi-madalia, ka assi-al-lato-kamou kmytta jau-an: ka mi-la, assi madallia, ka kmytt-'âl-ato-kamou jau-an, alei ka sah-ka kouah-koh mou-koua ti Rama-an.
Assi-madalia, ka assi-al-lato-kamou kmytta jau-an: ka mi-la, assi madallia, ka kmytt-'âl-ato-kamou jau-an, alei ka sah-ka kouah-koh mou-koua ti Rama-an.
S.TRANSL: Eenen kleynen [tijdt] ende ghy en sult my niet sien: ende ende wederom eenen kleynen [tijdt], ende op sult my sienwant ick gae henen tot den Dader.
A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me, because I go to the Father.
「等不多時，你們就不得見我；再等不多時，你們還要見我。」

S.FORM: Annata ni-mæh-tavæta-væhta [rarouma ki] Pahtatæu tæu-han tyn, Mang ta pa-sou sou-en tyn kanna ymit-æn, Assi madallia, ka assi-âl-ato-kamou kmytta jau-an: ka mi-la, assi madallia, ka kmytt'-âl-ato-kamou jau-an: ka, Alei ka sah-kakoua-ah-koh mou-koua ti Rama-an?

Annata ni-mæh-tavæta-væhta [rarouma ki] Pahtatæu tæu-han tyn, Mang ta pa-sou sou-en tyn kanna ymit-æn, Assi madallia, ka assi-âl-ato-kamou kmytta jau-an: ka mi-la, assi madallia, ka kmytt'-âl-ato-kamou jau-an: ka, Alei ka sah-kakoua-ah-koh mou-koua ti Rama-an?
S.TRANSL: [Sommige] Dan uyt sijne Discipulen seyden tot malkanderen Wat is Dit Dat hy tot ons seght Eenen kley nen [tijdt], ende ghy en sult my niet sien: ende wederom eenen Klennen [tijdt], ende ghy sult my sien: ende Want ick gae henen tot Den Dader?

Then said some of his disciples among themselves, What is this that he saith unto us, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me: and, Because I go to the Father?
有幾個門徒就彼此說：「他對我們說：『等不多時，你們就不得見我；再等不多時，你們還要見我』；又說：『因我往父那裏去。』這是甚麼意思呢？」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta neni; Mang ta pa-sou sou-en tyn kanna; Assi madallia? Assi-kytta mou-mhga mang ta fou tya.
Ka ni-k'ma ta neni; Mang ta pa-sou sou-en tyn kanna; Assi madallia? Assi-kytta mou-mhga mang ta fou tya.
S.TRANSL: Sy seyden dan wat is Dit Dat hy seght Eenen. Kleynen [tijdt]? Wy en weten. niet wat hy seght.
They said therefore, What is this that he saith, A little while? we cannot tell what he saith.
門徒彼此說：「他說『等不多時』到底是甚麼意思呢？我們不明白他所說的話。」

S.FORM: Ra ti Jesus ka kmalang ki-kamoei-in nein tmaligh tyni-æn, ni-k'ma neini-æn, Mahtavæta-væh-kamou ki atta matetaligh, ka ni-pa-sousou-en-nau, Assi madallia, ka assi-âl-ato-kamou kmyt-ta jau-an: ka mila, Assi madalia, ka kmytt'âl-ato-kamou jau-an?

Ra ti Jesus ka kmalang ki-kamoei-in nein tmaligh tyni-æn, ni-k'ma neini-æn, Mahtavæta-væh-kamou ki atta matetaligh, ka ni-pa-sousou-en-nau, Assi madallia, ka assi-âl-ato-kamou kmytta jau-an: ka mila, Assi madalia, ka kmytt'âl-ato-kamou jau-an?
S.TRANSL: Jesus Dan bekende Dat sy hem wilden braghen ende seyde tot haer Draeght ghy Daer ban onder malkanderen Dat ick geseght hebbe Eenen kleynen [tijdt], ende ghy en sult my niet sien : enDe wederom Eenen kleybuen [tijdt] ende ghy sult my sien?

Now Jesus knew that they were desirous to ask him, and said unto them, Do ye enquire among yourselves of that I said, A little while, and ye shall not see me: and again, a little while, and ye shall see me?
耶穌看出他們要問他，就說：「我說『等不多時，你們就不得見我；再等不多時，你們還要見我』，你們為這話彼此相問嗎？

S.FORM: Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou-ra, tmangi-tangi-ah-kamou rmaroungoroungo, ra ma-rai-ahta næi: ka mavoulas-ah-ka-mou, rapa-si-lala-eih ta kavou-las-noumi tou karai-an.
Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou-ra, tmangi-tangi-ah-kamou rmaroungoroungo, ra ma-rai-ahta næi: ka mavoulas-ah-ka-mou, rapa-si-lala-eih ta kavou-las-noumi tou karai-an.
S.TRANSL: Doorwaer boorwaer ick segge u Dat ghy sult schreyen en klaeghiick weenen maer De werelt sal Haer berblijden : ende ghy sult bedroft zijn Maer uwe droefheydt sal tot blijdtschap worden.
Verily, verily, I say unto you, That ye shall weep and lament, but the world shall rejoice: and ye shall be sorrowful, but your sorrow shall be turned into joy.
我實實在在地告訴你們，你們將要痛哭、哀號，世人倒要喜樂；你們將要憂愁，然而你們的憂愁要變為喜樂。

S.FORM: Akou voulas ta ina rou mei-rauwei, alei ka ierrou'-ato-ta kidi ki t'lei tyn: Itou-ra mei-kaha mei-rauwei ki alak, assi tya hi-balei-en ta ni-kahimkoan tyn, alei ki karai-en ka pei-rauwei-en-atota ka'uloung tou næi.

Akou voulas ta ina rou mei-rauwei, alei ka ierrou'-ato-ta kidi ki t'lei tyn: Itou-ra mei-kaha mei-rauwei ki alak, assi tya hi-balei-en ta ni-kahimkoan tyn, alei ki karai-en ka pei-rauwei-en-atota ka'uloung tou næi.
S.TRANSL: Een brouwe wanneer sy sy baer heeft droesheyt Dewijle Hare uyre gekomen is maer wanneer sy het Kindeken gebaert Heeft so en gedenckt sy De benauwtheyt niet meer Om De blijdtschap Dat een mensche ter werelt geboren is.
A woman when she is in travail hath sorrow, because her hour is come: but as soon as she is delivered of the child, she remembereth no more the anguish, for joy that a man is born into the world.
婦人生產的時候就憂愁，因為她的時候到了；既生了孩子，就不再記念那苦楚，因為歡喜世上生了一個人。

S.FORM: 'Ka akou voulas-kamou hnyn ta ymoumi, ra mi-la-ah-koh kmytta ymoumi-n, ka ma-rai-ah-kamou ki tintin, ka assi mau-mi'ah ymoumi an ta ti ma-mang ki karai-ei-moumi.
'Ka akou voulas-kamou hnyn ta ymoumi, ra mi-la-ah-koh kmytta ymoumi-n, ka ma-rai-ah-kamou ki tintin, ka assi mau-mi'ah ymoumi an ta ti ma-mang ki karai-ei-moumi.
S.TRANSL: Ende ghy Dan hebt nu wel droesheyt maer ick sal u wederom sien ende nw' herte sal hem berblijden ende niemandt en sal uwe blijdschap ban u wegh nemen.
And ye now therefore have sorrow: but I will see you again, and your heart shall rejoice, and your joy no man taketh from you.
你們現在也是憂愁，但我要再見你們，你們的心就喜樂了；這喜樂也沒有人能奪去。

S.FORM: Ka tou wæ'i-kanna assi-kamou tmalig-a jau-an ki .ma-mang. Missing, missing koun-au-kamou-ra, kamæmang ka t'oumymia-ei-moumi ti Rama-an tou nanang-au, pi'æ-ah ta teni ymoumi-æn.
Ka tou wæ'i-kanna assi-kamou tmalig-a jau-an ki .ma-mang. Missing, missing koun-au-kamou-ra, kamæmang ka t'oumymia-ei-moumi ti Rama-an tou nanang-au, pi'æ-ah ta teni ymoumi-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende in dien dagh en sult ghy my niets bragen Doorwaer boorwaer ick segge u al wat ghy Den Dader sult bidden in mijnen name [dat] sal hy u geben.
And in that day ye shall ask me nothing. Verily, verily, I say unto you, Whatsoever ye shall ask the Father in my name, he will give it you.
到那日，你們甚麼也就不問我了。我實實在在地告訴你們，你們若向父求甚麼，他必因我的名賜給你們。

S.FORM: Tou kidi appa hnyn assi-kamou ni-tmoumymmia tou na-nang-au:tmoumymmi-i, ka ar'-au-moumi,a lei ka paka-tmoei-auh ta karai-an-oumi.
Tou kidi appa hnyn assi-kamou ni-tmoumymmia tou na-nang-au:tmoumymmi-i, ka ar'-au-moumi,a lei ka paka-tmoei-auh ta karai-an-oumi.
S.TRANSL: Tot noch toe en Hebt ghy niet gebeden in mijnen name bidt ende ghy sult ontsangen op Dat we blijdschap berbult zy.
Hitherto have ye asked nothing in my name: ask, and ye shall receive, that your joy may be full.
向來你們沒有奉我的名求甚麼，如今你們求，就必得着，叫你們的喜樂可以滿足。」

S.FORM: Kamamang k'atta ni-pa-sousou-en-nau-kamou ki pæ myh-kaulaul'-an, raierrouata kidi ki tæ'lei, ka assi-koh mi-la-ah ma-sousou ymoumi-æn ki px myh-kaulau I-an, ra pou-ding-ding-ei-mau-kamou pou-pænzh ti Rama-an.

Kamamang k'atta ni-pa-sousou-en-nau-kamou ki pæ myh-kaulaul'-an, raierrouata kidi ki tæ'lei, ka assi-koh mi-la-ah ma-sousou ymoumi-æn ki px myh-kaulau I-an, ra pou-ding-ding-ei-mau-kamou pou-pænzh ti Rama-an.
S.TRANSL: Dese dingen hebbe ick door gelijckenissen tot u gesproken : maer De uyre komt Dat ick niet meer Door gelijckenissen tot spreken en sal maer sal u bry uyt ban den Dader berkondigen.
These things have I spoken unto you in proverbs: but the time cometh, when I shall no more speak unto you in proverbs, but I shall shew you plainly of the Father.
「這些事，我是用比喻對你們說的；時候將到，我不再用比喻對你們說，乃要將父明明地告訴你們。

S.FORM: Tou wæ'i-k'anna tmou-mymmya-ah-kamou tou Na-nang-au, ka assi-mau-kamou pa-sousou-en, ka tmoumymy-'ah-koh toumymmia ti Rama-an alei ymoumi-an.
Tou wæ'i-k'anna tmou-mymmya-ah-kamou tou Na-nang-au, ka assi-mau-kamou pa-sousou-en, ka tmoumymy-'ah-koh toumymmia ti Rama-an alei ymoumi-an.
S.TRANSL: Indien dagh sult ghy in in mijnen Name bidden enDe ick en segge u niet Dat ick Dader boor u bidden sal.
At that day ye shall ask in my name: and I say not unto you, that I will pray the Father for you:
到那日，你們要奉我的名祈求；我並不對你們說，我要為你們求父。

S.FORM: Ka ti Rama ta mamadou mavæ'ängö ymoumi-æn, alei ka ni-mævangö-kamou jau-an tna'-msing ka ni-pæ'r kouaen-nau mou-pænæh ki Alid.
Ka ti Rama ta mamadou mavæ'ängö ymoumi-æn, alei ka ni-mævangö-kamou jau-an tna'-msing ka ni-pæ'r kouaen-nau mou-pænæh ki Alid.
S.TRANSL: Want De Dader selbe heeft u lief bewijle ghy my lief gehadt hebt ende hebt gelooft Dat ick ban Godt hen uytgegaen.
For the Father himself loveth you, because ye have loved me, and have believed that I came out from God.
父自己愛你們；因為你們已經愛我，又信我是從父出來的。

S.FORM: Ni-tæ'i-koua-en-nau ki Ramamou-pænæh tou næi, mi-Ia ta ka-la-ah-koh ki næi sah-ka koua ti Rama-an.
Ni-tæ'i-koua-en-nau ki Ramamou-pænæh tou næi, mi-Ia ta ka-la-ah-koh ki næi sah-ka koua ti Rama-an.
S.TRANSL: Ick ben ban Den DaDer uytgegaen ende ben in de werelt gekomen wederom berlate ick De werelt ende gae hemen tot den Dader.
I came forth from the Father, and am come into the world: again, I leave the world, and go to the Father.
我從父出來，到了世界；我又離開世界，往父那裏去。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta Pæh-tatæutæu-han tyn, Kyttei, mattæ'i dingding kow hnyn ki sou tou assi ki pæmyh kaulaul'-an-ki ma-mang.
Ni-k'ma tyni-æn ta Pæh-tatæutæu-han tyn, Kyttei, mattæ'i dingding kow hnyn ki sou tou assi ki pæmyh kaulaul'-an-ki ma-mang.
S.TRANSL: Sijne Discipulen seyDen tot hem Siet nu spreeckt ghy bry uyt ende en seght geen gelijckenisse.
His disciples said unto him, Lo, now speakest thou plainly, and speakest no proverb.
門徒說：「如今你是明說，並不用比喻了。

S.FORM: Kavana'-n-nian hnyn ka mou-atigh kow mou-mhga ki mamang, ka assi-kow mæi ǣǣpo ka teitaligh en-kow timamang, Alei ki anna tna-'msing-kame ka ni-tæ'i koua-en-hou makka-koua ki Alid.
Kavana'-n-nian hnyn ka mou-atigh kow mou-mhga ki mamang, ka assi-kow mæi ǣǣpo ka teitaligh en-kow timamang, Alei ki anna tna-'msing-kame ka ni-tæ'i koua-en-hou makka-koua ki Alid.
S.TRANSL: Nu weten wy dat ghy alle Dingen weet ende ghy en Hebt niet ban noode Dat u yemandt brage. Hierom gelooben wy Dat ghy ban Godt uytgegaen zijt.
Now are we sure that thou knowest all things, and needest not that any man should ask thee: by this we believe that thou camest forth from God.
現在我們曉得你凡事都知道，也不用人問你，因此我們信你是從上帝出來的。」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Tna-'msing-kamou kauwahnyn?
Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Tna-'msing-kamou kauwahnyn?
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoordde haer Gelooft ghy nu :
Jesus answered them, Do ye now believe?
耶穌說：「現在你們信嗎？

S.FORM: Kytt-'ei ierroua ta kidi ki tæ'lei, ka mahkahato ierroua hnyn, ki papæi-avovoak-eih-ka-mou ta mei-boävou al tou â-teni, ka pa-i-tou-saat-ah-kamou jau-an. Ierroua-appa kanna ka assi-koh tou faät : ka ti Rama ta tou-lam jau-an.

Kytt'ei ierroua ta kidi ki tæ'lei, ka mahkahato ierroua hnyn, ki papæi-avovoak-eih-ka-mou ta mei-boävou al tou â-teni, ka pa-i-tou-saat-ah-kamou jau-an. Ierroua-appa kanna ka assi-koh tou faät : ka ti Rama ta tou-lam jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Siet De uyre komt ende is nu gekomen dat ghy sult ber stroyt worden een yegelick na het sijne ende ghy my alleen sult laten. Ende [noch[nochtans] en ben ich niet a leen : want De Dader is Met my.
Behold, the hour cometh, yea, is now come, that ye shall be scattered, every man to his own, and shall leave me alone: and yet I am not alone, because the Father is with me.
看哪，時候將到，且是已經到了，你們要分散，各歸自己的地方去，留下我獨自一人；其實我不是獨自一人，因為有父與我同在。

S.FORM: Kamamang katta ni-pa-sousou-en-nau ymoumi-æn, alei ka akou reia-ah-kamou jau-an. A koumea-ah-kamou tou næi ki sa sam'k-kin : ra mashut-tâ kiryh, ni-tounnoun-nau ta næi.
Kamamang katta ni-pa-sousou-en-nau ymoumi-æn, alei ka akou reia-ah-kamou jau-an. A koumea-ah-kamou tou næi ki sa sam'k-kin : ra mashut-tâ kiryh, ni-tounnoun-nau ta næi.
S.TRANSL: Dese dingen hebbe ick tot gesroken op dat ghy in my brede hebbet. In De werelt sult ghy berdreckinge hebben : maer hebbet goeden moedt ick hebbe de wereldt ober wonnen.
These things I have spoken unto you, that in me ye might have peace. In the world ye shall have tribulation: but be of good cheer; I have overcome the world.
我將這些事告訴你們，是要叫你們在我裏面有平安。在世上，你們有苦難；但你們可以放心，我已經勝了世界。」
